notes: Chunk 66 DONE (Template A, Tier B, 25 routes): Uruguay to SE/NO/DK/FI/PT x5; Panama to PT x1; Dominican Republic to SE/NO/DK/FI x4; Germany to JM/PA/UY/DO x4; France to JM/PA/UY/DO x4; Netherlands to JM/PA/UY/DO x4; Belgium to JM/PA/UY x3. EU origins use correct national export authorities (Veterinaramt, DDPP, NVWA, FASFC/AFSCA). Jamaica = VSD permit 8-12 weeks + 14-day Plumb Point quarantine + 2 rounds parasite treatment. Panama = no permit + Embassy authentication + USD 20 MIDA fee. Uruguay = MGAP permit 6-10 weeks + Praziquantel dogs 72h-30 days. DR = no permit + core vaccinations + 15-day cert. Next: Chunk 67 (Template B, Tier B). Blog Day 25 after.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
